dashboard.name: Traffic Trajectory Overview
dashboard.description: Default local dashboard for transformed vehicle trajectory metrics.

queries.name: Trajectory Runs Summary
queries.description: Run-level row counts, vehicle counts, and average speeds.
queries.query: select dataset_date, area, run_identifier, source_file, trajectory_record_count, metadata_row_count, vehicle_count, average_track_speed, average_observed_speed, first_observed_at, last_observed_at from mart.fct_trajectory_runs order by dataset_date desc, run_identifier desc;

queries.name: Vehicle Type Counts
queries.description: Vehicle counts and trajectory records by type.
queries.query: select dataset_date, area, run_identifier, vehicle_type, vehicle_count, trajectory_record_count, average_track_speed, average_observed_speed from mart.vehicle_type_metrics order by dataset_date desc, vehicle_count desc;

queries.name: Trajectory Coverage
queries.description: Observed trajectory time coverage per run.
queries.query: select dataset_date, area, run_identifier, min(first_observed_at) as first_observed_at, max(last_observed_at) as last_observed_at, sum(trajectory_record_count) as trajectory_record_count from mart.fct_trajectory_runs group by 1, 2, 3 order by dataset_date desc, run_identifier desc;
